placements.overview:
Founded in 1926, Andhra University - Vizianagaram Campus is a public university. It is located in Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh. Andhra University - Vizianagaram Campus provides PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 3 courses across specialisation such as English. Some of the courses offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM, M.A. and M.Ed. Andhra University - Vizianagaram Campus fees ranges between INR 2,00,000 to 3,00,000. Andhra University - Vizianagaram Campus offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies, Humanities & Social Sciences and Teaching & Education. The median salary offered to students is INR 6,62,000. Andhra University - Vizianagaram Campus offers all the campus facilities to students.

Q. How many courses are offered by Andhra University?

A. Andhra University offers 313 courses in Arts, Commerce, Management, Science and Technology, Engineering, Law, Pharmacy and Education, and so on.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: There is no hostel, but teaching faculty members were very good.

review_content.Placements: I have completed my MBA in Andhra University campus Vizianagaram in the batch 2016-2018. In our batch, around 60% of the students get placements in different companies. The highest salary package offered is 5.5 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 2.7 LPA and the average salary package offered is 4.1 LPA. Many companies conducted recruitment drives like Karvy, Stock Broking, HCl, Kotak Mahindra Bank, ICICI Bank, etc. MBA offers three specialisations on our campus,i.e., HR, marketing and finance. HR-related job roles are offered to 10% of the students like HR trainee and recruiters. Another 15% of the students get a job in the finance sector, like equity analyst and accountants. In the marketing sector, sales managers and sales executive job roles were offered. The highest salary package was offered in the finance sector, and the lowest salary package is offered in the marketing-based job as a sales executive. Almost 30% of the students get an internship in different companies like Dr Reddy's Laboratory, C Vishaka Steel Plant, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I don't suggest anyone join this college. Everyone will get something better than this.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement at all. They simply say that there is 100% placement. There is no placement training, and they force us to pay placement fees. 5k is just a waste. I suggest no one join here. Better to join another college. For everything, they make us pay money.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, I never ever used it. I still don't know if there is any Wi-Fi in our college. Coming to the lab, there are no proper systems at all. Even during exam time, we need to wait for the execution until someone completes their execution. Classrooms and the library are good. There are no medical facilities. Mess and canteen food we can't eat.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I found the best college at an affordable price.

review_content.Placements: They provide placements in companies like Google, Amazon, and many more companies. According to the resume, they hire students from each department minimum CGPSC 7 should be there and the student must meet all the criteria which are given by the college or institute.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are good. They provide all according to our needs and pretty good rooms. They clean day by day. We have friendly staff. They are good. They focus on our hygiene and they provide more valuable food three times a day.

reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with placements in 2024.

review_content.Placements: As per my knowledge, 10% of students got placed. The lowest package is 2 LPA and the highest package is 3 LPA. Companies like Just Dial, Prakaran Law Technology, High Source, Aapka Loan, etc., visit the college to hire students. In my batch, students do not get internships. Companies offer roles like sales executive, salesperson, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, there is no Wi-Fi facility but while joining they said they will provide a Wi-Fi facility. It provides labs and a library facility. There is a hostel on campus and it provides good food. It has a good infrastructure for sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with the placements in 2024.

review_content.Placements: As per my knowledge, 10% of students got placed. The lowest package is 2 LPA, and the highest package is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Just Dail, Prakaran Law Tech, High Source, Apka Loan, etc. In my batch, no students got internships. The companies offer roles like sales executive, salem person, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, there is no Wi-Fi facility but while joining they said they would provide Wi-Fi facility. Lab and library facilities are also available. They provide good food in the hostel and there is no doubt about it. We have good infrastructure for sports and games as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024

review_content.Placements: Many students got placed in the college. The highest package in the college is 3 LPA. The lowest package is 1.4 LPA. Top recruiting companies in the college are Flipkart, Amazon, Tata, etc. In my course, top companies are construction teams and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are different types of labs. We have computer labs, survey labs, and mechanical labs. All labs are good. Classrooms are also good.
review_content.Faculty: All our teachers have good behaviour. They support anything. I am studying civil engineering 1st year. They are good at teaching and understanding. Semester exams are difficult. The internal exam is easy. The pass percentage is 100%. 40 is the pass mark. The passing mark in the internal exam is 12 out of 30 marks.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Not a good college for placement purposes, but only for a certificate it's good.

review_content.Placements: 0% students are placed from this college. They told 162+ companies come for placements, but during the placement time, I didn't see any company. No one got any kind of internship, and not a single person got any kind of placement. They just give you stress every time.
review_content.Infrastructure: College hostel fee is more than PG rent, so I prefer to stay in PG. The college mess is also not good, they just loot the money. Medical even they don't have any type of first aid kit. Sports, there is some space for sports, like you can play some indoor games.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 70-80% students were placed from my course. The highest package offered was 9 LPA, the lowest package was 2 LPA with an average package of 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our courses are Jaro, Intellipaat, delta x, HDFC, ICICI, Kotak life insurance, Indiamart, etc. Top Roles offered in our courses are that of sales executive, Human resource marketing etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent with the classrooms being wide and spacious. We have a great campus. The quality of food in the canteen is good, it is hygienic and has good taste. Medical facility is available 24*7. The college has a separate sports department.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Banking and Finance - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college. Its events should be more popular than the college itself.

review_content.Placements: Actually, I took my second-year exam, but the result couldn’t be released, and no one conducted interviews for jobs. I did freelancing. Many different companies offered internships, but no one arranged placements or internships through the college. However, the management worked to support students.
review_content.Infrastructure: It was good, but the management could have provided better facilities to students. Labs and classrooms were good. I can’t say much about the hostel because I didn’t live there, so I can’t share details about hostel life or the food. However, I would like to say that the canteen area and food should be good.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding DSVV - Dev Sanskriti Vishwavidyalaya Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: DSVV - Dev Sanskriti Vishwavidyalaya offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Mass Communication & Media. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., BCA and B.A. On the other hand, at the PG level, the DSVV - Dev Sanskriti Vishwavidyalaya offers MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and PG Diploma.

reviews_list.review_title: Dev Sanskriti Vishwavidyalaya - The university with diversity.

review_content.Placements: Students become eligible for placements in the last semester of their courses. Although the placement is not so good here, after completing your course, students are eligible for off-campus placements. Undergraduate students here usually prefer to pursue their Masters after completing their course.
review_content.Infrastructure: For yoga, this is the best university you will ever come across, but for other courses there is still a lag. Although the curriculum is designed in such a way that it makes you industry-ready. Coming to hostel topic, the hostel rooms are not so bad you can easily manage your living, plus hostel wardens are also very supportive here.

reviews_list.review_title: University Course: Nay University Life: Yay.

review_content.Placements: I did my Bachelors in English Honours from there, it is not a course that gives you any placement initially but does open a lot of internship opportunities, which can help you secure a good placement in big companies or educational institutions over time.
review_content.Infrastructure: The teachers are just phenomenal, and they deserve as much respect as is humanly possible. But there's always a certain perspective where teachers who are new to the department lack that experience. I personally had to study from few newly appointed teachers, though they lacked the skill to teach to some extent but their commitment was much appreciable.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has peace, beauty, and a love of nature.

content.Placements: There are 20 seats. The highest salary is Rs. 50,000 per month, and the lowest salary is Rs. 10,000 per month. The average salary is Rs. 25,000 per month. Placements are available from here in Amar Ujala, Doordarshan. HNN news channel recruits students from the college. Roles like advertisements on Facebook, editor in Indian Express, and content creators are offered. Students should also communicate with people.
content.Infrastructure: There is not much Wi-Fi facility here but it is available in the class. The library here is very good. There are some smart classrooms. The lab is also available here. There is a huge ground to play here. DSVV provides good and healthy food to eat. A hospital has also been built here for students.

individual_reviews.course: MBA (Tourism and Travel Management) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty members, industry-focused curriculum, and great learning experience.

content.Placements: All students are placed, the starting salary is Rs. 15,000 per month. My batchmates got placed in companies like Make My Trip and many others. Overall all things are going well. 100% of students got internships. Top roles offered in our course are sales executive, operations department, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, computer lab, projected classrooms, and good quality food, overall all things are good and available. There is a hospital in campus and all treatment is free for students and also an eye hospital where eye checkups are also free for students. There are two grounds one for basketball, kabaddi, and the other one for cricket and other activities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dev Sanskriti Vishwavidyalaya - The university with diversity.

content.Placements: Students become eligible for placements in the last semester of their courses. Although the placement is not so good here, after completing your course, students are eligible for off-campus placements. Undergraduate students here usually prefer to pursue their Masters after completing their course.
content.Infrastructure: For yoga, this is the best university you will ever come across, but for other courses there is still a lag. Although the curriculum is designed in such a way that it makes you industry-ready. Coming to hostel topic, the hostel rooms are not so bad you can easily manage your living, plus hostel wardens are also very supportive here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: University Course: Nay University Life: Yay.

content.Placements: I did my Bachelors in English Honours from there, it is not a course that gives you any placement initially but does open a lot of internship opportunities, which can help you secure a good placement in big companies or educational institutions over time.
content.Infrastructure: The teachers are just phenomenal, and they deserve as much respect as is humanly possible. But there's always a certain perspective where teachers who are new to the department lack that experience. I personally had to study from few newly appointed teachers, though they lacked the skill to teach to some extent but their commitment was much appreciable.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It shapes your personality with positivity in and negativity out.

content.Placements: Number of students is 28. No on-campus placement is provided. There is only a social internship conducted in DSVV. There are many programmes, lectures, and projects offered in our course. Utsav and Unain, which are the annual function and sports day, are conducted for students.
content.Infrastructure: There are three labs for my course with good Wi-Fi, classrooms, and others. The facilities in our hostel are adorable with strict discipline, rules, and regulations. Mess food is simple, pure, and healthy. Sports like cricket, basketball, badminton, etc., are available. Canteen food is healthy as well as tasty. Medical facilities like eye care and others are available.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Handball, Kho-Kho, Kabbadi, Volleyball, Long Jump, Athletic including throwing Events, Table Tennis

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Psychology Lab, Journalism And Mass Communication Lab, Holistic Health Management lab, Village Management and self-employment lab, Naturopathy lab, Animation Lab, Handloom Industry, Hand made paper industry

reviews.review_heading: It has peace, beauty, and a love of nature.
reviews.review_text: There is not much Wi-Fi facility here but it is available in the class. The library here is very good. There are some smart classrooms. The lab is also available here. There is a huge ground to play here. DSVV provides good and healthy food to eat. A hospital has also been built here for students.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty members, industry-focused curriculum, and great learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, computer lab, projected classrooms, and good quality food, overall all things are good and available. There is a hospital in campus and all treatment is free for students and also an eye hospital where eye checkups are also free for students. There are two grounds one for basketball, kabaddi, and the other one for cricket and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: Dev Sanskriti Vishwavidyalaya - The university with diversity.
reviews.review_text: For yoga, this is the best university you will ever come across, but for other courses there is still a lag. Although the curriculum is designed in such a way that it makes you industry-ready. Coming to hostel topic, the hostel rooms are not so bad you can easily manage your living, plus hostel wardens are also very supportive here.

reviews.review_heading:
University Course: Nay
University Life: Yay.
reviews.review_text: The teachers are just phenomenal, and they deserve as much respect as is humanly possible. But there's always a certain perspective where teachers who are new to the department lack that experience. I personally had to study from few newly appointed teachers, though they lacked the skill to teach to some extent but their commitment was much appreciable.

reviews.review_heading: It shapes your personality with positivity in and negativity out.
reviews.review_text: There are three labs for my course with good Wi-Fi, classrooms, and others. The facilities in our hostel are adorable with strict discipline, rules, and regulations. Mess food is simple, pure, and healthy. Sports like cricket, basketball, badminton, etc., are available. Canteen food is healthy as well as tasty. Medical facilities like eye care and others are available.

reviews.review_heading: A college for holistic growth along with placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Internet is good and college has good labs for all the purpose taught. The systems are updated with the latest software and are powerful enough to run everything which is taught. Classrooms are spacious and well ventilated. College has a big library which has a lots of books of almost every domain. Mobile phones are not allowed in college and can be used only in hostel. The rules are somewhat restrictive. Mess food is very good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with good placements.
reviews.review_text: We have two college buildings, a computer lab, a BCA lab, an IT lab, and 3 floors library. Mobile phones are not allowed on campus. They are available in the hostel. The quality of the food is the best according to the fees. The food is fresh and clean. There is no use for extra spices. Our college has three grounds and one basketball ground.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides great teachers and the infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: Internet and classrooms are good in our college. The systems are well-updated and hardware is powerful enough to run all new technologies and practicals. The hostel is good but it is restrictive in terms of rules. Mess is well maintained, but the food quality is average. The medical center is good, and sports area is also better.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dev Sanskriti Vishwavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and environment of our university are very good. All facilities available like classrooms, library, and labs that are enriched with resources. The library has the bulk of books that help students in grooming. The quality of food served is good and cleanliness is the first priority. They provide pure vegetarian food. Medical facilities, sports departments, and much more are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of DSVV - Dev Sanskriti Vishwavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were good. Facilities like Wi-Fi, library, computer laboratory, anatomy laboratory, physiology laboratory, sports, medical facilities, alternative therapies like naturopathy, etc., were available. Hostel facilities were good. Our campus was not Wi-Fi enabled. Mess was average, and the food served in the canteen was good.

reviews.review_heading: Students will be completely satisfied if they take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: This college has excellent facilities and infrastructure, and there are all things available that a student wants to study like well-maintained laboratories, library, classes, etc. This university is good, it has a good option, all the facilities are there, apart from this everything is good. There are good options in cultural activities and sports, using which students can go further in this field.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostels were good, and there was no ragging. Seniors and security were good, and there was some restriction like after 8.00 PM students can not go out from hostel. Apart from that noise was prohibited that was good, also library was good, and there were several books that students can gain knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good university, and also provide good placements in all the courses.
reviews.review_text: College provides good facilities to students in the university like 12 hours lab and faculty and 12 hours system facility. There is a good facility in the hostel and get good food. Students can get attracted to spirituality and also have good facilities for medical free for all students. There is Ayurveda treatment available for everyone.

reviews.review_heading: A university with a difference to other universities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like 15 labs, more than 200 classrooms, one central library,  24*7 hours free medical facilities, and every field of sports are available on campus. The whole campus is enabled with the Wi-Fi facility. The quality of labs and classrooms are high. The quality of food is high, and the canteen provides pure vegetarian.

reviews.review_heading: Everyone is absolutely satisfied with everything of our university.
reviews.review_text: Our university campus has a beautiful infrastructure. Our university is focused on environment-safe programmes. There is Wi-Fi facility available. There are labs available for all the purposes like biology lab, computer lab, physiotherapy lab, etc. There is e-education system in the classroom. There is a very big library in which all types of books are available. Our university has its own hospital. The sports are good. Food of our canteen is cheap and hygienic.
